attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	WJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,
	WJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
	WJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	WJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	WJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
	WJEL.DEBIT_CREDIT_ENTRY_TYPE,
	WJEL.EFFECTIVE_DT,
	WJEL.EFFECTIVE_DT_CALENDAR_CD,
	WJEL.EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
	WJEL.EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT,
	WJEL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
	WJEL.INTERCOMPANY_ROLE,
	WJEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE,
	WJEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE_CD,
	WJEL.OVRD_TRX_FNC_CURR_CNV_RT,
	WJEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT,
	WJEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT,
	WJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
	WJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
	WJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_COMPANY_CD,
	WJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_DEPT_CD,
	WJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_ACCT_CD,
	WJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_LOC_CD,
	WJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_PROJECT_CD,
	WJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_SUBACCT_CD,
	WJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
	WJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
	WJEL.SS_CD,
	WJEL.EDW_CREATE_USER,
	WJEL.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	WJEL.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	WJEL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	WJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
	WJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT, 
	WJEL.DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
	WJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,  
	WJEL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,   
	WJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,  
	WJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,      
	WJEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD,          
	WJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_CD,
	WJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD,
	WJEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR ,
    WJEL.EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID ,
	WJEL.JEL_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
	WJEL.JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DTM,
	WJEL.DV_JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DT	
 FROM $$WORKDB.W_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE WJEL
WHERE  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
                     WHERE NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT =  WJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
                      AND  NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT  =	 WJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT  
                      AND  NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  =              WJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY                 
                      AND  NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE  =		 WJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
                      and njel.DV_fiscal_year_month_num_int  in (select DV_fiscal_year_month_num_int from  $$WORKDB.W_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE group by 1)

                  )

SELECT
NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,
NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
NJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
NJEL.DEBIT_CREDIT_ENTRY_TYPE,
NJEL.EFFECTIVE_DT,
NJEL.EFFECTIVE_DT_CALENDAR_CD,
NJEL.EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
NJEL.EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT,
NJEL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
NJEL.INTERCOMPANY_ROLE,
NJEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE,
NJEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE_CD,
NJEL.OVRD_TRX_FNC_CURR_CNV_RT,
NJEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT,
NJEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT,
NJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
NJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
NJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_COMPANY_CD,
NJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_DEPT_CD,
NJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_ACCT_CD,
NJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_LOC_CD,
NJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_PROJECT_CD,
NJEL.RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_SUBACCT_CD,
NJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
NJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
NJEL.SS_CD                         ,
NJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
NJEL.DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
NJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
NJEL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,
NJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
NJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
NJEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD,
NJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_CD,
NJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD,
NJEL.EDW_CREATE_USER ,
NJEL.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
NJEL.EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
NJEL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
NJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
NJEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR,
NJEL.RU_VENDOR_INVOICE_PAYMENT_KEY,
NJEL.EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID,
NJEL.JEL_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
NJEL.JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DTM,
NJEL.DV_JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DT,
NJE.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
NJE.POSTED_DTM
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY RFAH
ON (RFAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = NJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
AND RFAH.LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID ='EXPENSE' AND RFAH.LEVEL04_ACCT_GROUP_ID<> 'Non Expense SSOT Other' )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE /* Added  start*/
ON  ( NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT =  NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
AND  NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
ON NJE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  /* Added  end */
WHERE
(  NJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD  IN ( 'MO' , 'MC' )
OR(  NJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD =  'UO'     /* Added  start */
AND NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME =  'Revaluation'
AND NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME = 'Revaluation'
AND NSOB.PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG ='Y'  /* Added  end */
)
)

SELECT
BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
,BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   
,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE   
,DEBIT_CREDIT_ENTRY_TYPE       
,EFFECTIVE_DT                  
,EFFECTIVE_DT_CALENDAR_CD      
,EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT
,EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT    
,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,INTERCOMPANY_ROLE             
,JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE       
,JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE_CD    
,OVRD_TRX_FNC_CURR_CNV_RT      
,RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT          
,RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT           
,RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT      
,RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT       
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_COMPANY_CD 
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_DEPT_CD    
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_ACCT_CD
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_LOC_CD 
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_PROJECT_CD 
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_SUBACCT_CD 
,RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT   
,RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT    
,SS_CD                         
,DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT 
,DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT   
,DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT    
,DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   
,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       
,DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD           
,DD_BK_DEPT_CD                 
,DD_BK_PROJECT_CD              
,DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD
,EDW_CREATE_USER               
,EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  
,JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR      
,RU_VENDOR_INVOICE_PAYMENT_KEY 
,EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID         
,JEL_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY 
,JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DTM    
,DV_JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DT  
,'JEL' TRANSACTION_TYPE            
,TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,POSTED_DTM                    
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_MT_EXPENSE_MEASURE_JEL A
where not exists 
(  
select 1 from   $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EXPENSE_MEASURE MEXM
WHERE 
A.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT=MEXM.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT 
AND A.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT=MEXM.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
AND A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY= MEXM.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND A.BK_COMPANY_CODE= MEXM.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND A.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT = MEXM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
AND MEXM.TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'JEL'
)
